programme.title: Threads Of Gold
programme.desc: People In the jute mills near Kolkata, where harsh conditions persist, the threatened industry and its environmental toll unfold, raising the question of whether change can emerge from hardship.

programme.title: Threads Of Gold
programme.desc: People In the jute mills near Kolkata, where harsh conditions persist, the threatened industry and its environmental toll unfold, raising the question of whether change can emerge from hardship.

programme.title: Shepherds Around The World
programme.desc: People Mark Michel and his team embark on a global journey, immersing themselves in the lives of five diverse pastoral communities to explore their unique cultures, challenges, and enduring traditions.

programme.title: Four Seasons In The Forests
programme.desc: Nature Different creatures interact with nature; some appear and others hide each season, providing variety in the forest.

programme.title: The Battle For Survival In The Mediterranean
programme.desc: Nature Despite the dangers and threats to which marine creatures are exposed daily in the Mediterranean Sea due to factory and farm waste, these creatures struggle to survive through adaptation and biological evolution.

programme.title: In Love With Wild Horses
programme.desc: People An amazing journey through the enchanting nature of the North American continent, home to the Tsoulcotine people, known as the horse people because of their timeless and unique bond with horses.

programme.title: Arab Digital Community
programme.desc: Sciences Examines the impact of digital content on Arab society by following top content creators and how they shape the audience's awareness, questions, and values.

programme.title: Arabic Radio
programme.desc: History.

programme.title: The Diabetes Battle In Australia
programme.desc: Fitness & Health An Australian physician and a physiologist are revolutionizing the world of diseases by presenting a scientifically based diet that can eliminate type 2 diabetes.

programme.title: Mysteries Of The Modern Science
programme.desc: Sciences Despite the progressive scientific developments in many fields, science remains baffled by unexpected cosmic phenomena such as solar storms. Research into many mysteries continues, but science must be prepared to deal with the discoveries' consequences.

programme.title: Protecting Sondong Cave
programme.desc: Nature A journey into the heart of Phong Nha-Ke Bang cave, located in northern Vietnam and listed as a UNESCO World Heritage Site. This cave, the largest in the world, is an extraordinary marvel, featuring a lake, forest, clouds, and a rare ecosystem.

programme.title: Secrets Of Mount Olympus
programme.desc: Nature An exciting and enjoyable exploratory adventure in one of the strangest places in the world: Mount Olympus, once the home of the gods in Greek mythology. Now, scientists are working tirelessly to understand its strange phenomena.

programme.title: Santorini's Mystery
programme.desc: Nature Researchers from around the globe embark on a high-stakes mission to investigate the volatile volcano of Santorini, plunging beneath the sea to gather evidence and unravel questions that have intrigued historians and scientists for decades.

programme.title: Cheese From The Heart Of Nature
programme.desc: Nature Cheese makers strive to preserve the traditional flavor threatened by modern industry, passing down their age-old secrets through generations, believing that authentic taste is crafted by patient, loving hands, not machines.

programme.title: A Mosque's Story
programme.desc: History We travel through the mosques of the world to learn their untold stories, contemplate their designs and decorations, and explore through them the cultural and social transformations that they have witnessed over time.

programme.title: Crescent In The Face Of Nazism
programme.desc: History During the Nazi invasion of France, hundreds of Jews found refuge in the Grand Mosque of Paris and other Islamic institutions, where Muslims bravely risked their lives to shield them from capture and death.

programme.title: Arab Digital Community
programme.desc: Sciences Examines the impact of digital content on Arab society by following top content creators and how they shape the audience's awareness, questions, and values.

programme.title: The Impossible Journey
programme.desc: Nature In the heart of the icy wilderness, 28 brave adventurers battle for survival after being stranded. Tim Jarvis revives their impossible journey in a legendary challenge.

programme.title: The Impossible Journey
programme.desc: Nature In the heart of the icy wilderness, 28 brave adventurers battle for survival after being stranded. Tim Jarvis revives their impossible journey in a legendary challenge.

programme.title: Tahtaci People.. Children Of Forest
programme.desc: Nature In the Aegean forests in southern Turkey, a strange sect of loggers performs special rituals when cutting trees in season, where they pray and offer sacrifices because they believe that each tree has its own spirit.

programme.title: Secrets Deep In The Ice
programme.desc: Nature Scientists embark on a journey to the coldest and most frozen places, where they uncover mummified bodies, lost treasures, and mysterious viruses beneath layers of ice, using state-of-the-art tools and technologies that give us glimpses into the past.

programme.title: Mysteries Of The Modern Science

In each segment, context is outlined and different views are included and challenged to provide a thorough, comprehensive understanding of the topic and its political and social significance for an Arab speaking audience. Lilian Dawood, Zaher Omren.

programme.title: News
programme.desc: Investigation Timely coverage of the latest major events across the region and around the world.

Ranbir Kapoor, Anil Kapoor, Bobby Deol, Rashmika Mandanna, Shakti Kapoor, Sandeep Reddy Vanga, Saurabh Gupta, Suresh Bandaru.

Hesham Maged, Chico, May Kassab, Mirna Gamil, Ahmed Fathy, Mohammed Tharwat, Moataz Al Tony, Ahmed Saad Wali.

programme.desc: Despite leaving his love behind and starting fresh, the surprising presence of Yamac's mother disturbs all of his feelings asking him to return and aid the family legacy. Aras Bulut Iynemli, Erkan Kolcak Kostendil.

Ayesha Singh, Neil Bhatt, Aishwarya Sharma Bhatt, Sanjivani Amit Takkar, Kishori Shahane, Jaydeep Sen, Rajesh Chawla.

programme.title: Al Aghar
programme.desc: Despite his changed identity, Youssef is still haunted by the murder of his mother, which drives him to seek out the killer and exact revenge no matter how long it takes. Amr Saad, Dorra Zarrouq.

programme.title: Stiletto
programme.desc: A police officer investigates a murder that occurred at a party. During the investigations, he discovers many secrets related to everyone attended it. Karess Bashar, Dima Kandalaft, Nada Abou Farhaat, Rita Harb, Qays Sheikh Najib, Ender Emir, Lobna Meshlah, Mai Hayek.

programme.title: Wild Bees
programme.desc: Following their father's death, three daughters stand up to the richest and most powerful man in their village, who is trying to buy their land. Despite their desperate attempts to resist him, their eldest sister is forced to marry his son. Maria Kitsou, Elli Tringou.

programme.title: The Game: Champions League
programme.desc: With Wassim taking the grand prize, the competition takes an exciting turn. Mazou gathers his energy and determination to bounce back, rebuild his reputation, and show everyone what he's really made of after a tough loss. Hesham Maged, Chico, May Kassab, Mirna Gamil, Ahmed Fathy, Mohammed Tharwat, Moataz Al Tony, Ahmed Saad Wali.

programme.title: Sadaf
programme.desc: In the 1970s, Detective Shaheen investigates the mysterious disappearance of several women, as the kidnapper leaves behind photos of them at the crime scene as the only clue, increasing the mystery and containing unexpected secrets. Abdel Rahman Al Aqel, Hussain Al Mahdi, Buthaina Al Raisi, Ahmad Iraj, Abdulah Bahman, Ghadeer Al Sabti, Khaled Al Ajereb, Fay Al Sharqawi, Naser Abbas, Fahad Basem, Smood Al Mo'men, Nour Mahmoud, Abbas Khalifi, Zaman Abduallah, Ahmed Al Sadoun, Haneen Hamed, Hasan Ibrahim, Mohammad Anwar Mohammad, Abdullah Al Edan, Mohammad Anwar Mohammad.

Hossein Dashti, Abdullah Boushahri, Mahmoud Boushahri, Osama Al Mezeal, Areej Attar, Salma Salem, Shahd Elkhataab, Fatima Al-Busairi, Nour Al-Badri, Abdullah Boushehri, Mahmoud Boushehri.

programme.title: Poisoned Honey
programme.desc: In a peaceful family setting, Fouad's home brims with warmth and unity. However, when faced with adversity, tensions mount, testing the family's bonds and revealing their readiness to make sacrifices. Dhoul Faqar Khedr, Seba Ibrahim, Bakr Khalid, Hend Nezar, Zohour Alaa, Fady Selim, Nada Emad Khalil, Zul Feqar Khedr, Saba Ibrahem.

programme.title: My Family Wins
programme.desc: In each episode, Jawad Al Shakarchi hosts two families competing to answer a series of general knowledge questions to win the grand prize of ten million Iraqi dinars. Jawad Al Shakraji, Fadi Hadad, Haider Nashi, Jawad Al Shakarchi, Fadi Haddad, Jawad Al Shakarji.

programme.title: Wild Heart
programme.desc: Kidnapped from his wealthy family as a child, Yaman grows up on the streets, forming close bonds along the way. Years later, he's reunited with his biological family but struggles to adjust to a life of privilege he no longer remembers. Halit Özgür Sari, Yurdaer Okur, Dolunay Soysert, Bertan Asllani, Cagatay Tosun, Hilal Yildiz, Halit Ozgur Sari, Simay Barlas.

programme.title: Bahar
programme.desc: After surviving a serious illness, Bahar, a devoted wife, finds herself facing a series of personal setbacks. With her marriage falling apart, she chooses to reclaim control of her life by returning to the medical career she once left behind. Demet Evgar, Mehmet Yilmaz Ak, Bugra Gülsoy, Ecem Özkaya, Füsun Demirel, Neslihan Yeşilyurt, Ayça Üzüm, Bugra Gulsoy, Ecem Ozkaya, Fusun Demirel, Elit Andac Cam, Demirhan Demircioglu, Neslihan Yesilyurt, Ayca Uzum.

programme.title: A Wannabe Courageous
programme.desc: On the instructions of his wife's psychiatrist, Omar must adopt other male personas to help his wife overcome the trauma of seeing him severely beaten on their wedding day. Ramez Galal, Gamila Awad, Bayoumi Fouad, Maha Abou Ouf, Mohamed Abd EL Rahman, Mahmoud Karim, Loai El Sayed, Jamila Awad, Loai El Sayyed, Loay Al Sayed, Loay Al Sayyed, Mohamed Abd Alrahman, Mohamed Abdel Rahman.

programme.title: My Family Wins
programme.desc: In each episode, Jawad Al Shakarchi hosts two families competing to answer a series of general knowledge questions to win the grand prize of ten million Iraqi dinars. Jawad Al Shakraji, Fadi Hadad, Haider Nashi, Jawad Al Shakarchi, Fadi Haddad, Jawad Al Shakarji.

programme.title: Telling Jokes
programme.desc: Talk shows It displays many of the jokes and comedic situations that the hosts are exposed to and it also hosts a person who shares them their stories. Hedeir Al Shamy, Bakr Naif, Majid Yassin, Yasser Samy, Sabbah Al Helaly, Basem Al Boghdady.

programme.title: Sweet And Sour
programme.desc: After his past adventures, Saadoun returns to daily life, navigating hilarious mishaps with his quirky neighbors and eccentric coworkers, as comedy and chaos unfold around him. Ali Gaber, Ihssan Daadoush, Oussama Al-Sharqi, Hussein Al Najjar, Alaa Hussien, Ali Jaber, Khalil Ibrahim, Mohamed Hussein Abd El Rehim, Fawzya Hassan, Osama Al Sharqi, Ehsan Dadosh.

programme.title: Coma D
programme.desc: Iraqi characters discuss various social issues within the community in a funny and humorous way in an attempt to find solutions. Eiad Radhi, Alaa Hussien, Ihssan Daadoush, Ali Gaber, Aly Qasem Al Malak, Osama El Sharqawy, Hussein Al Najjar.

programme.title: Tonight With Dadosh
programme.desc: A TV show that's hosted by Ihssan Daadoush, who interviews a number of celebrities in a humorous way. Ihssan Daadoush, Aliou Al Shayeb, Wael Al Sadat, Ehsan Dadosh.

programme.title: The Lamb
programme.desc: Faisal, a young and courageous boy, embarks on an extraordinary and thrilling adventure. Determined and fearless, he faces every challenge head-on in his relentless pursuit to rescue his beloved little lamb, the most cherished companion he has. Ashley Avis, Jo Rogers, Sumaya Rida, Fahed Al Ghamedi, Zara Al Balushi, Reyad Alsalhany, Abdul Aziz Al-Qahtany.

programme.title: Sweet And Sour
programme.desc: After his past adventures, Saadoun returns to daily life, navigating hilarious mishaps with his quirky neighbors and eccentric coworkers, as comedy and chaos unfold around him. Ali Gaber, Ihssan Daadoush, Oussama Al-Sharqi, Hussein Al Najjar, Alaa Hussien, Ali Jaber, Khalil Ibrahim, Mohamed Hussein Abd El Rehim, Fawzya Hassan, Osama Al Sharqi, Ehsan Dadosh.

programme.title: Telling Jokes
programme.desc: Talk shows It displays many of the jokes and comedic situations that the hosts are exposed to and it also hosts a person who shares them their stories. Hedeir Al Shamy, Bakr Naif, Majid Yassin, Yasser Samy, Sabbah Al Helaly, Basem Al Boghdady.

programme.title: El Zeep In The Heart
programme.desc: A financial accountant is accused of embezzlement he did not commit, and constantly strives to prove his innocence, especially within his family, where some believe in his innocence while others are convinced of his guilt. Mohamed Al Hamely, Said Hamed, Khalaf Al Harbi, Nasser Al-Qasabi, Habib Al Habib, Rashed Al Shamrani, Mohamed Al Hamly, Said Hamid, Nasser Al Qasabi, Habeeb Al Habeeb.

programme.title: Tonight With Dadosh
programme.desc: A TV show that's hosted by Ihssan Daadoush, who interviews a number of celebrities in a humorous way. Ehsan Dadosh.

programme.title: Royal Opera House Muscat
programme.desc: Musical Comedy Elevating Oman's cultural landscape, the Royal Opera House Muscat is a beacon of artistic excellence. Nestled in Muscat's vibrant Shati Al-Qurm district, it offers a rich tapestry of musical performances and cultural experiences.

programme.title: Hajjan
programme.desc: After a tragic accident befalls the brothers Matar and Ghanim, young Matar finds himself involved in the erratic world of camel racing, willing to go to any length to save his camel Hafira. Abdel Mohsen Al Nemr, Omar Al Atawi.

programme.title: تسلي

programme.desc: S2 E17 يلتقي كمال لأول مرة بعائلة نعمان، فيما يخبر نعمان أفراد عائلته بأن كمال سيبدأ العمل لديه وسط دهشة الجميع، أما فخري، فيخبر زوجته وابنه بحقيقة صادمة.
programme.title: عائلة الحاج نعمان الموس

programme.desc: S1 E17 يكتشف خالد خيانة زوجته له من خلال رسائل نصية قام أحد الأشخاص بعرضها عليه تثبت علاقته بها، ويتشاجر أيضاً مع زوجته شاهيناز بعد أن علم بأمر المشادة الكلامية التي وقعت بينها وبين والدته وشقيقاته.
programme.title: ولي العهد الموس

programme.desc: S1 E1 ملحمة تاريخية تروي سيرة ثاني الخلفاء الراشدين، أمير المؤمنين عمر بن الخطاب رضي الله عنه، ودوره الجوهري في تثبيت ركائز الدولة الإسلامية ونشر الدعوة.

programme.desc: مسرحية كوميدية عن تاجر موز وصراع أبناءه الأربعة على الأموال والميراث بعد وفاته.
programme.title: بابا جاب موز

programme.desc: مدرس لغة عربية مثال للحزم والإنضباط، ينتقل إلى القاهرة للعمل في مدرسة خاصة، يكتشف تعلق الطلبة بمغنية مشهورة ويقرر إبعادهم عنها، ليقع ما لم يكن في الحسبان.
programme.title: رمضان مبروك أبو العلمين حمودة

programme.desc: S1 E1 ملحمة تاريخية تروي سيرة ثاني الخلفاء الراشدين، أمير المؤمنين عمر بن الخطاب رضي الله عنه، ودوره الجوهري في تثبيت ركائز الدولة الإسلامية ونشر الدعوة.
programme.title: عمر موس

programme.desc: جدول البرامج غير متاح.
programme.title: جدول البرامج غير متاح

programme.desc: مسرحية كوميدية عن تاجر موز وصراع أبناءه الأربعة على الأموال والميراث بعد وفاته.
programme.title: بابا جاب موز

programme.desc: ينطلق خليل وزاهية في رحلة مليئة بالمغامرات عندما يكتشفان سرا خطيرا خلال حفل زفاف والده على والدتها.
programme.title: تسلي

programme.desc: S2 E17 يلتقي كمال لأول مرة بعائلة نعمان، فيما يخبر نعمان أفراد عائلته بأن كمال سيبدأ العمل لديه وسط دهشة الجميع، أما فخري، فيخبر زوجته وابنه بحقيقة صادمة.
programme.title: عائلة الحاج نعمان الموس

programme.desc: S1 E17 يكتشف خالد خيانة زوجته له من خلال رسائل نصية قام أحد الأشخاص بعرضها عليه تثبت علاقته بها، ويتشاجر أيضاً مع زوجته شاهيناز بعد أن علم بأمر المشادة الكلامية التي وقعت بينها وبين والدته وشقيقاته.
programme.title: ولي العهد الموس

programme.desc: S1 E1 ملحمة تاريخية تروي سيرة ثاني الخلفاء الراشدين، أمير المؤمنين عمر بن الخطاب رضي الله عنه، ودوره الجوهري في تثبيت ركائز الدولة الإسلامية ونشر الدعوة.

programme.title: عائلة الحاج نعمان الموس

programme.desc: S1 E17 يكتشف خالد خيانة زوجته له من خلال رسائل نصية قام أحد الأشخاص بعرضها عليه تثبت علاقته بها، ويتشاجر أيضاً مع زوجته شاهيناز بعد أن علم بأمر المشادة الكلامية التي وقعت بينها وبين والدته وشقيقاته.
programme.title: ولي العهد الموس

programme.desc: يواجه إبراهيم صعوبات مادية تجبره على التخلي عن حلمه في احتراف لعبة كرة القدم، والعمل كسائق في إحدى المدارس، حيث يلتقي بمعلمة الرسم مريم وينافس سياسيا ثريا للفوز بقلبها.
programme.title: كابتن هيما

programme.desc: S2 E18 يلتقي كمال بريم في منزل نظمي ليقدم اعتذاره لها وليتباهى أمامها بما وصل إليه من ثراء على يد جده نعمان، ويخبر والدته لاحقا عن رغبته بالزواج من الأخيرة.
programme.title: عائلة الحاج نعمان موس

programme.desc: S1 E18 يحاول خالد بث الطمأنينة في قلوب شقيقاته فيخبرهن بأنه سيحرر ورقة لصالحهن تؤكد على حقهن الشرعي في الميراث في حالة وفاته لكن يحدث ما لم يكن في الحسبان.
programme.title: ولي العهد الموس

programme.title: Radha Mohan
programme.desc: Niharika Roy, Shabbir Ahluwalia.

programme.title: Window Girl
programme.desc: Raised under strict control by her mother, Nalan gets married to Sedat, who comes from a very wealthy family. Soon, she discovers that his family is also unstable, forcing her to deal with problems from both sides. Burcu Biricik, Selma Ergec.

programme.title: Window Girl
programme.desc: Raised under strict control by her mother, Nalan gets married to Sedat, who comes from a very wealthy family. Soon, she discovers that his family is also unstable, forcing her to deal with problems from both sides. Burcu Biricik, Selma Ergec.

programme.title: Kaise Mujhe Tum Mil Gaye
programme.desc: Amruta believes in love and marriage, while Virat avoids relationships because of past heartbreak. As they spend time together, they must deal with their differences and the growing challenges in their relationship. Sriti Jha, Arjit Taneja.

programme.title: Kaise Mujhe Tum Mil Gaye
programme.desc: Amruta believes in love and marriage, while Virat avoids relationships because of past heartbreak. As they spend time together, they must deal with their differences and the growing challenges in their relationship. Sriti Jha, Arjit Taneja.

programme.title: Marasli
programme.desc: Celal's life takes a dangerous turn when he crosses paths with Mahur, a courageous journalist who witnesses a crime. Since then, their fates become intertwined. Burak Deniz, Alina Boz, Serhat Mustafa Kiliç, Saygin Soysal, Cengiz Sezgin, Arda Sarigün, Ethem Özisik.

programme.title: Marasli
programme.desc: Celal's life takes a dangerous turn when he crosses paths with Mahur, a courageous journalist who witnesses a crime. Since then, their fates become intertwined. Burak Deniz, Alina Boz, Serhat Mustafa Kiliç, Saygin Soysal, Cengiz Sezgin, Arda Sarigün, Ethem Özisik.

programme.title: Tongue-tied
programme.desc: When Nelly, a vigilant teacher with a troubled past, suspects that a looming danger hovers over her beloved step-son, she stops at nothing to protect him, leading to a domino effect that threatens the stability of her family and community. Amina Khalil, Ahmad Al Saadany, Mohamed Shahin, Yosra Al Lozy, Tharaa Goubil, Karim El Shennawy, Mariam Naoum, Ali Al Baily.

programme.title: Tongue-tied

programme.title: Kaleerein
programme.desc: Meera is a free-spirited woman who rejects the pressure of traditional marriage. Her life changes when she meets Vivaan, a wealthy businessman searching for his family in India. Arjit Taneja, Aditi Sharma.

programme.title: Suspended
programme.desc: After the end of the Syrian war and the return of the residents of El Atarrin Alley to their houses, the new generation loses their identity and tries to imitate Western manners, while those who fake being patriots corrupt the country. Sulaf Fawakherji, Abbas Alnouri.

programme.desc: After the end of the Syrian war and the return of the residents of El Atarrin Alley to their houses, the new generation loses their identity and tries to imitate Western manners, while those who fake being patriots corrupt the country. Sulaf Fawakherji, Abbas Alnouri.
